meaning: n.边缘主义者,实行边缘政策者
examples: In her studies of macaque monkeys, Brinkman has noticed that primates (monkeys) seem to learn a hand preference from their mother in the first year of life but this could be one hand or the other.
So there is nothing to stop people "following" several clubs, as Kantar director Richard Brinkman acknowledges.
